summary: REGRESSION TEST PASSED - Code quality refactoring verified. All 29 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend flows tested: Landing → Problem Selection → Voice Selection → Chat with AI response. Burger menu data-driven structure verified with all 7 menu items. Centralized token management (getAuthToken/setAuthToken/removeAuthToken) working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: apiClient.js centralization VERIFIED - getAuthToken/setAuthToken/removeAuthToken exported and used across app
AuthContext.jsx uses setAuthToken/removeAuthToken from apiClient correctly
useAudioStream.js uses getAuthToken from apiClient for TTS auth headers
ChatPage.jsx uses getAuthToken from apiClient for TTS preloading
useChat.js extracted loadChatHistory function working correctly
BurgerMenu.jsx data-driven with MENU_ITEMS array - all items render correctly (voice, radio, specialists, about)
LanguageGrid and ThemeOptions extracted as separate components in BurgerMenu
seed_data_creation: Guest users created during tests for isolation

mocked_apis.webhook_signature: MOCKED - Webhook signature verification may not work end-to-end with test key

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 was a REGRESSION test after code quality refactoring. All features verified working: (1) AUTH: Guest creation, Register, Login, /me, Logout; (2) CHAT: POST /api/chat returns AI response, chat history persists, sessions list works; (3) PAYMENTS: Test tariff activates, paid tariffs return Stripe URL; (4) BOOKINGS: Slots returned with calendar, booking creation works; (5) USER SETTINGS: Voice, problem, language, theme updates; (6) FRONTEND FLOW: Landing → Problem Selection → Voice Selection → Chat with AI response; (7) Burger menu shows all 7 items (voice, radio, specialists, about, language, theme, booking); (8) Booking calendar loads with weekday slots and price $200/hr; (9) Specialists page shows Miron Shakira. Key refactoring changes verified: centralized apiClient token functions, extracted useChat loadChatHistory, data-driven BurgerMenu with MENU_ITEMS array, extracted chat.py and bookings.py helper functions.

features_tested.7_chat_ai_response: PASS - POST /api/chat returns AI response from OpenRouter
features_tested.10_bookings_slots: PASS - GET /api/bookings/slots returns calendar with weekday slots
features_tested.15_frontend_flow: PASS - Landing → Problems → Voice Selection → Chat with AI response
features_tested.16_burger_menu: PASS - All 7 menu items present (voice, radio, specialists, about, language, theme, booking)
features_tested.17_token_management: PASS - Token properly set/get/remove via centralized apiClient functions
